title: 予測の不確実性を扇で示す (Forecast Fan Chart)
novelty_reason: 将来予測の中央値を中心に、複数の予測区間を内側から外側へ段階的に重ねることで、不確実性が先に進むほど扇状に広がる様子を表現します。
why_it_works: 最後の実績点を起点に複数の帯が徐々に広がるため、『予測の中心』と『不確実性の拡大』が一目で伝わります。
how_to_read: 濃い中心帯ほど発生確率が高い範囲です。
外側の帯ほど低確率なシナリオを含みます。
実績から予測に切り替わる地点を起点に、将来へ進むほど扇が広がります。
use_cases: 中央銀行のインフレ率予測
需要予測のレンジ提示
売上予測のベスト/ベース/ワースト共有
transform_js: var hist=rawData.history||[];var fc=rawData.forecast||[];var cats=hist.map(function(d){return d.t;}).concat(fc.map(function(d){return d.t;}));var histVals=hist.map(function(d){return d.v;});var last=histVals.length?histVals[histVals.length-1]:null;function pre(){var a=[];for(var i=0;i<Math.max(0,hist.length-1);i++)a.push('-');return a;}function anchored(key){var a=pre();if(last!==null)a.push(last);return a.concat(fc.map(function(d){return d[key];}));}function delta(upper,lower){return upper.map(function(v,i){return v==='-'||lower[i]==='-'?'-':+(v-lower[i]).toFixed(4);});}var history=histVals.concat(fc.map(function(){return '-';}));var median=anchored('m');var l90=anchored('l90');var u90=anchored('u90');var l70=anchored('l70');var u70=anchored('u70');var l50=anchored('l50');var u50=anchored('u50');transformedData={cats:cats,history:history,median:median,l90:l90,u90d:delta(u90,l90),l70:l70,u70d:delta(u70,l70),l50:l50,u50d:delta(u50,l50)};
echarts_js: option={title:{text:'Forecast Fan Chart',left:'center',top:8,textStyle:{fontSize:18,fontWeight:'bold'}},tooltip:{trigger:'axis',axisPointer:{type:'line'}},legend:{data:['実績','中央値予測','50%帯','70%帯','90%帯'],bottom:8},grid:{left:'8%',right:'5%',top:52,bottom:56},xAxis:{type:'category',data:transformedData.cats,boundaryGap:false,axisLine:{lineStyle:{color:'#666'}}},yAxis:{type:'value',scale:true,axisLine:{show:false},splitLine:{lineStyle:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,0.10)'}}},series:[{name:'90%帯',type:'line',data:transformedData.l90,stack:'fan90',symbol:'none',lineStyle:{opacity:0},areaStyle:{opacity:0},emphasis:{disabled:true}},{name:'90%帯',type:'line',data:transformedData.u90d,stack:'fan90',symbol:'none',lineStyle:{opacity:0},areaStyle:{color:'rgba(84,112,198,0.14)'},z:1,emphasis:{disabled:true}},{name:'70%帯',type:'line',data:transformedData.l70,stack:'fan70',symbol:'none',lineStyle:{opacity:0},areaStyle:{opacity:0},emphasis:{disabled:true}},{name:'70%帯',type:'line',data:transformedData.u70d,stack:'fan70',symbol:'none',lineStyle:{opacity:0},areaStyle:{color:'rgba(84,112,198,0.22)'},z:2,emphasis:{disabled:true}},{name:'50%帯',type:'line',data:transformedData.l50,stack:'fan50',symbol:'none',lineStyle:{opacity:0},areaStyle:{opacity:0},emphasis:{disabled:true}},{name:'50%帯',type:'line',data:transformedData.u50d,stack:'fan50',symbol:'none',lineStyle:{opacity:0},areaStyle:{color:'rgba(84,112,198,0.34)'},z:3,emphasis:{disabled:true}},{name:'実績',type:'line',data:transformedData.history,symbol:'circle',symbolSize:7,lineStyle:{width:3,color:'#3b3b3b'},itemStyle:{color:'#3b3b3b'},z:5},{name:'中央値予測',type:'line',data:transformedData.median,symbol:'circle',symbolSize:6,lineStyle:{width:3,type:'dashed',color:'#1a3cab'},itemStyle:{color:'#1a3cab'},z:6}]};
